name: Mind Palace
short_description: Dive into a surreal VR world where your thoughts take shape. Build, connect, and explore your own Mind Palace - a space of ideas, movement, and endless curiosity.
detailed_description:
Mind Palace

Enter the dreamy world of Mind Palace. A place for exploration, movement and thriving thoughts.

Explore the World

Traverse a surreal open world filled with winding paths and shifting biomes. Hike through colourful meadows, climb towering structures, jump across rocks, run through dark caves, slide down steep slopes or zipline from peaks.

Curious things await in every corner - the world is yours to play.

A Spatial Home for Your Notes

You're given a full set of tools to express your thoughts: write with a keyboard, draw with the drawboard, or speak freely using your microphone.

Place your notes in meaningful locations, connect them to spark new ideas, and organize everything with topics. Use the topic gun to place key themes, move multiple notes using the inventory jar, and delete irrelevant ones with a satisfying smash from the hammer.

You can also import your own notes including text, images, audio and even PDF files. Additionally you can import notes from the following apps:

  • Notion

  • Obsidian

  • Google Keep

  • OneNote

  • Evernote

  • WhatsApp

Challenge Yourself

Need inspiration? Receive endless, randomized quests to guide you — like connecting ideas, using a specific tool, or completing a run.

Take on fast-paced parkour runs scattered across the world. Run your way through timed challenges and beat your personal best time.

There's no single way to use your mind. Just enter, explore, and see what thoughts bubble up.

Original Soundtrack by Amrock Plaza

Notion, Obsidian, Google Keep, OneNote, Evernote and WhatsApp are trademarks of their respective owners. This game is not affiliated with or endorsed by these companies.
